title: Roldalna

{{Quote|You are the ones I seek. I have employment for you to do, if interested you are. Several crates of spice has my employer—Nigel VI they are on, Lohopa II they need to go. Transportation they need, pay well we will.|Und'l, to a group of smugglers at a cantina on Roldalna|<ref name="Package" />}}
'''Roldalna''' was a celestial body located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]]. Shortly after the [[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|formation]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], it was the site of a [[Roldalna cantina|cantina]].

The [[Buzchub]] [[Und'l]] arranged a meeting at the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] with a group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], hiring them on behalf of his employer to [[Transport/Legends|transport]] what he believed to be [[Spice/Legends|spice]]. In reality, the cargo was the [[Death/Legends|lethal]] [[Poison/Legends|poison]] [[lexonite]], and Und'l's employer had the smugglers' [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotaged]] during their stay on Roldalna in order to later [[Thief/Legends|hijack]] the shipment.

==Description==
Roldalna was an astronomical object<ref name="Package" /> located in the [[Roldalna system/Legends|Roldalna system]].<ref name="TwinStars" /> It was a part of the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]]<ref name="EAOC Roldalna" /> and lay within the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC Roldalna" />

The [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connected Roldalna to the [[Nigel system/Legends|Nigel]] and [[Ropagi system/Legends|Ropagi systems]], which could be reached in six [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] and one [[Standard day/Legends|day]], fifteen hours, respectively, by traveling on a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] equipped with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. Another hyperlane linked Roldalna to the<ref name="TwinStars" /> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Seltos system/Legends|Seltos system]], which could be reached in two days and three hours.<ref name="TwinStars" />

==History==
[[File:Undl-ThePackage.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The Buzchub Und'l (right) hired a group of smugglers on Roldalna.]]
Shortly after the [[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|establishment]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]<ref name="Package" /> in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the [[Buzchub]] [[Und'l]] contacted a group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] with an offer of a pickup/delivery job on behalf of his employer, arranging a meeting at a [[Roldalna cantina|cantina]] on Roldalna. Arriving ahead of the Buzchub, the group spent some [[Time/Legends|time]] interacting with the [[Cantina/Legends|bar's]] patrons. During the smugglers' stay in the cantina, Und'l's employer had their [[Freighter/Legends|freighter's]] hyperdrive [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotaged]] in order to later [[Thief/Legends|hijack]] the cargo—several crates of the [[Death/Legends|deadly]] [[Poison/Legends|poison]] [[lexonite]]—from the group mid-delivery.<ref name="Package" />

When Und'l finally arrived at the cantina, he provided the smugglers with the details of the job, although, due to the Buzchub's own ignorance of the cargo's true nature, he claimed the group would be [[Transport/Legends|transporting]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]]. Receiving a down payment for the job, the smugglers then left Roldalna for the pickup site on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nigel VI]].<ref name="Package" />

==Locations==
A cantina was situated on Roldalna following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]<ref name="Package" /> of 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].<ref name="NEC" /> It featured a bar, several tables, a [[photon dart board]], a [[Hologram/Legends|holo]] area, and a [[Zero-G dance floor]]. [[Music/Legends|Music]] at the cantina was provided by a [[Band/Legends|band]] of [[Musician/Legends|musicians]].<ref name="Package" />

==Behind the scenes==
Roldalna first appeared in "[[The Package (adventure)|The Package]]," a ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure written by [[Dave Marron]] and published by [[West End Games]] in the [[1993]] book [[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']].<ref name="Package" />

The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Roldalna [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Roldalna itself, in grid square N-15 as part of the Expansion Region. The book also depicted the system on a map, albeit in the Mid Rim, grid square N-16.<ref name="TEA" /> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to ''The Essential Atlas'' later provided a placement of Expansion Region, grid square N-16, which this article assumes to be correct.<ref name="EAOC" />
